CustomField.description: The Payroll Invoice Setting that will be applied to Pay Transactions related to this Assignment. Credit Payroll Settings and Invoiceable Fee settings are only related to the Account.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The Payroll Invoice Setting that will be applied to Pay Transactions related to this Assignment. Credit Payroll Settings and Invoiceable Fee settings are only related to the Account.
CustomField.label: Payroll Invoice Setting ID
